notes: Product clarification completed: default project type is executable Project Execution project; omitted workspace path should create a formal automatic workspace named with project title plus timestamp.

Review found no blocking product questions. Main implementation risk is distinguishing automatic workspaces from user-provided workspaces so project deletion cannot accidentally remove user-owned directories.
Checklist draft generated and waiting for user confirmation before todolist creation.
